chapter_title.en: Chapter on Oaths, Vows, and Expiations

text: 4303 - وَ سَأَلَ عَلِيُّ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ ، أَخَاهُ مُوسَى بْنَ جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِمَا اَلسَّلاَمُ : عَنِ اَلرَّجُلِ يَحْلِفُ وَ يَنْسَى مَا قَالَهُ قَالَ "هُوَ عَلَى مَا نَوَى".

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.4303 - Ali ibn Ja'far asked his brother Imam Musa ibn Jafar Al-Kadhim (as) about a man who takes an oath and then forgets what he said.
Imam (as) replied: "It is based on what he intended."
